4. For a $2 \pi$ -periodic function $x \in L ^ { 2 } ( [ 0 , 2 \pi ] )$ , let $x _ { n } ( t ) = x ( n t )$ , $n = 1 , 2 , \ldots .$
Prove that $\{ x _ { n } \}$ converges weakly in $L ^ { 2 } ( [ 0 , 2 \pi ] )$ and find the limit.

list_items: 5. Let $f$ be an entire function on $\mathbb { C }$ and there exists a constant $C > 0$ such that $f ( z ) | \leqslant$ $C \sqrt { | z | } | \cos ( z ) |$ for all $z \in \mathbb { C }$ . Prove that $f$ is identically zero.
6. Let $u ( t , x )$ satisfy the following equation,

text: where $u _ { 0 } \in C ^ { 2 } ( \mathbb { R } ^ { n } )$ , $\psi _ { i }$ , $i = 1 , \ldots , n$ are of bounded $C ^ { 2 }$ -norm, $\begin{array} { r } { \Delta = \sum _ { i = 1 } ^ { n } \partial _ { x _ { i } } ^ { 2 } } \end{array}$ is the Laplacian in $\mathbb { R } ^ { n }$ and $\mu > 0$ . Assume $| u _ { 0 } | \leqslant e ^ { \Phi / \mu }$ where $\Phi$ is bounded above and has Lipschitz constant 1. Assume that $\begin{array} { r } { ( \sum _ { i = 1 } ^ { n } | \Psi _ { i } ( t , x , u ) | ^ { 2 } ) ^ { 1 / 2 } \leqslant A } \end{array}$ , where $A$ is a postive constant.

| u (t, x) | \leqslant e ^ {C t} e ^ {((A + 1) t + \Phi (x) + 2) / \mu}, \quad \forall t \geqslant 0.
